headline: Ice Cube to Take Big3 League Public at $290 Million Valuation
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Big3, the 3-on-3 basketball league founded by Ice Cube and Jeff Kwatinetz, has entered into an agreement with a special purpose acquisition company to take the organization public.
